zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis II d'ANJOU於1377年10月5日出生在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯時，他的父親Louis I d’ANJOU38歲，母親Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON32歲。他於1400年12月2日與Yolande d'ARAGON在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年4月29日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年39歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis II d'ANJOU于1377年10月5日出生在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯时，他的父亲Louis I d’ANJOU38岁，母亲Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON32岁。他于1400年12月2日与Yolande d'ARAGON在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年4月29日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年39岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'ANJOU
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France (see Langevin ).

variants.name: Langevin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Henri, Jean-Louis, Pierre, Adelard, Emile, Gaston, Leodore, Lucien, Marcel.

French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', for an Angevin, i.e. for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France that was ruled by a count as an independent territory from the 10th century. The province became a property of the English Crown for fifty years at the end of the 12th century. Compare Longway and Lonsway .

History: Mathurin Langevin dit Lacroix from Le Lude in Sarthe, France, married Marie-Thérèse Martin in Quebec City, QC, in 1674. Michel Langevin from Paris, France, married Marguerite Guertin in Contrecoeur, QC, in 1714. Jean Bergevin dit Langevin from Angers in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Piton in Quebec City, QC, in 1668. Charles Citoleux/Sitoleux dit Langevin from Chambellay in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie-Louise Harel in Montreal, QC, in 1739.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis II d'ANJOU was born on 5 October 1377, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Louis I d’ANJOU, was 38 and his mother, Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON, was 32. He married Yolande d'ARAGON on 2 December 1400, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 April 1417, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 39, and was buried in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis II d'ANJOU est né le 5 octobre 1377, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Louis I d’ANJOU, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Yolande d'ARAGON le 2 décembre 1400, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1417, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis II d'ANJOU am 5. Oktober 1377 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis I d’ANJOU 38 und seine Mutter Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON 32. Er hat am 2. Dezember 1400 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Yolande d'ARAGON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1417 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis II d'ANJOU è nato il il 5 ottobre 1377 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Louis I d’ANJOU, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Yolande d'ARAGON il 2 dicembre 1400, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1417, nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis II d'ANJOUが1377年10月5日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父Louis I d’ANJOUは38歳，母Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLONは32歳であった。1400年12月2日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールでYolande d'ARAGONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年4月29日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで39歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis II d'ANJOU(이)가 1377년 10월 5일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis I d’ANJOU(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1400년 12월 2일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Yolande d'ARAGON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 4월 29일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis II d'ANJOU nasceu em 5 de outubro de 1377, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Louis I d’ANJOU, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande d'ARAGON em 2 de dezembro de 1400, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1417, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis II d'ANJOU родился 5 октября 1377 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis I d’ANJOU было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande d'ARAGON 2 декабря 1400 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 апреля 1417 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis II d'ANJOU nació el 5 de octubre de 1377, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Louis I d’ANJOU, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Marie de BLOIS-CHATILLON, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Yolande d'ARAGON el 2 de diciembre de 1400, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de abril de 1417, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
